nasb.text: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places in Christ,

esv.text: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing in the heavenly places,

cnv.text: 我們主耶穌基督的父　神是應當稱頌的。他在基督裡，曾經把天上各種屬靈的福分賜給我們：

ccb.text: 赞美我们主耶稣基督的父上帝！祂在基督里赐给了我们天上各样属灵的恩福。

csbs.text: 愿颂赞归于神——我们主耶稣基督的父！他在基督里，以天上各样属灵的福气祝福了我们，
